sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 65:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 65:1
items.html: The light clothing the vessel of Zeir Anpin is called “Ruach” because it rises to Bina, sucks abundance, and descends to Malchut, to bestow upon her, like the wind that goes back and forth (see answer 49).
